slashCommands.name: api-route
slashCommands.description: Tạo API route chuẩn Next.js 14 với Zod + Supabase
slashCommands.prompt: Generate a Next.js 14 App Router API route for Nam Ngân Travel. Use: NextResponse/NextRequest from 'next/server'; createAdminClient from '@/lib/supabase/admin' for writes; Zod safeParse before any DB write; try/catch wrapping entire handler; return { error } for 4xx/5xx. Standard status codes: 201 POST create, 200 GET/PATCH. Describe the route purpose.

slashCommands.name: zod-schema
slashCommands.description: Tạo Zod schema cho một entity trong dự án
slashCommands.prompt: Generate a Zod schema for Nam Ngân Travel. Rules: all required strings use .min(1); phone regex /^(0|\+84)[0-9]{8,10}$/; UUID fields z.string().uuid(); dates z.string().regex(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/); prices z.number().positive() (VND). Export both schema and inferred type: export type X = z.infer<typeof XSchema>. Place in src/lib/validations/<entity>.schema.ts. Describe the entity.

slashCommands.name: store
slashCommands.description: Tạo Zustand store cho module mới
slashCommands.prompt: Generate a Zustand store for Nam Ngân Travel. Pattern: define State and Actions interfaces separately; all fetch calls have try/catch with setError(msg); isLoading boolean; error string|null. File: src/store/<module>.store.ts. Export as useXStore named export. Do NOT persist unless asked. Describe the module.
